# MCP Weather Server Error Handling Tests
# Tests various error conditions and invalid inputs

# Build the weather server binary
go build -o mcp-weather-server .

# Set API key for tests
env OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=test_api_key_123

# Test missing location parameter for current weather
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test empty location parameter for current weather
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":""}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test missing location parameter for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test empty location parameter for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":""}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test invalid units parameter for current weather
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London","units":"celsius"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Should still make the API call but with invalid units
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test invalid units parameter for forecast
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_forecast","arguments":{"location":"Paris","units":"fahrenheit"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Should still make the API call but with invalid units
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting weather forecast'

# Test invalid location type (number instead of string)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":123}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test invalid location type (boolean instead of string)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":true}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test invalid units type (number instead of string)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London","units":123}},"id":2}
EOF

# Should proceed with default units since invalid units type is ignored
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test malformed JSON parameters
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":"invalid"},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'invalid parameters'

# Test calling non-existent tool
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_weather_history","arguments":{"location":"London"}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'tool not found'

# Test with null location
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":null}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test with array location
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":["London","UK"]}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test with object location
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":{"city":"London"}}},"id":2}
EOF

stderr 'location is required'

# Test with very long location name
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"$(printf 'A%.0s' {1..1000})"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Should fail with API error due to invalid location
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'
